steps.title: Locate the period values in the table
steps.content: The question defines period as time between consecutive pulses. Reading directly from the Period column: J0614-03 = 0.136 seconds, J0103+54 = 0.354 seconds, J1654-2335 = 0.545 seconds, J0545-03 = 1.074 seconds, J0121+53 = 2.725 seconds.

steps.title: Test which choice correctly describes the data
steps.content:
Choice A states that J0614-03 has the shortest period — and 0.136 seconds is indeed the minimum value in the table.

Choices B, C, and
  • D all contradict the data: B equates two unequal values
  • C misidentifies the longest period
  • D overstates J0103+54's actual period
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
